titleStmt.title: SII 11.178: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 178. (B.K. No. 62 of 1927-28.) CHIKKAVAḌAVAṬṬI, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE KALAMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kakkarasa was administering Suṟuka-Twelve and Avagavāḍi-Twelve, etc. It records the gift of land made by this officer for the benefit of the temple of Kalidēvasvāmin at Oḍavaḍḍi, to Rūvāri-Bammōja and to Brahmapuri Nāraṇa-Bhaṭṭa. Oḍavaḍḍi which is evidently the modern Chikkavaḍavaṭṭi, is stated to be the capital of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kakkarasa.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 51, Parābhava, Māgha, śu. 5, Wednesday, which regularly corresponds to A.D. 1127, January 19, Wednesday; ·68.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya saṁbhavē . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ . sūryyāya namaḥ . sarasvatyāya
namaḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭā
satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvavijeyarājya
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire yire © vritta . Iṭṭaḷamāge su
nadiṁ giḷiviṁḍi nōḷiyiṁ beṭṭada tarppaliṁ duliva kōgileyuṁ koḷadiṁda yā jāḍa
ḍḍida kōṭayiṁ desaye surāgrihaṁgaḷiṁ dopuva Oḍavaḍḍi karaṁ Ātiramya vāgi
drana pura kaṇeyenalu sogayisutamirppudu sivaṭa meṁtu nōrppaḍa . dhare baṇni
tatupura dutārāseyoḷu drōṇagiriya turada tāṭākā(ṁ)ntaradoḷu dakṣiṇa kalidē
vasvāmi nalasi niṁda nādaradiṁda . jalanidhiparivēṣṭitabhūvaḷeyado ḷopputta mippa ku(ṁ)ntaḷadhā
trīlalanege kaiyigaṁvaḍiyena puligeṟe nāḍoḷeseru mā sivaṭam . śrīparvvatakke mēlidu
vāraṇāsigaṁ baraladhikaṁ duritāri Oḍavaḍiya kalidēvaṁ nelasi niṁda dibya kṣētra . jaga
nagagaḷoḷeli Ādeḍaṁ sogayipa drōṇaparvvatada mēgesedoppuva divyatīrtadoḷu ka
rugadi kaṟugejje ghaṁṭeyiṁ deseva kavitoṇeya bairadēva rakṣike namā . vritta . suratara
saṁpage yiṁpanīye karamoppuva pādari pāṇbanaṁte kēdage mu sukuṁda sīva nāragalava
rjjera mātuḷuṁga varanēṟilu tāḷu taṁgu śrītāḷi tamāḷa me ṁbivaṟoḷoppugu miliyanaḍanāḷi
vavu nēṟilu candana srīgandha barvvaraṁ kappuradiṁ ceṁnderu bāḷe Īḷe kavuṁgeṁbavaṟiṁda mivanaṁ sogayisi
keṟe Āraveyiṁ doppuvapūdōṁṭadinda nāldeseyoḷu suttida beḷageygaḷi noppire giḷiviṁḍino
sogayisugu . vritta . baḷasidadriyadiṁdaṁ baḷe dodavida nānāvanabrāta diṁdaṁ kaḷakīravakaṁṭhadvāradiṁdaṁ
karigītadiṁdaṁ beḍagaṁ taḷedikkuṁ bhumibhāmāmaḷamukatiḷakaṁ śrī kakkabhūpana rājadhāni . Ena linnēva
ṇnipeṁ baṇnipe . kaṁda . sutida parikōliṁ daṁtoppuva rājanaḍakaḷa vaisāḷiyuṁ haḷi yuvaṁ kāvutaṁ sativorvvaḷu
taṁ giḷivi(ṁ)ṇḍadēṁ kara sogayisito . vritta . vanitānīkada muṁnte poṭṭaḷasi gēṇaṁ kirttu tūrddaṭṭi gīṟenalīḍāḍi kuru
ḷci kappuḷci piṁntāmuntumaṁ nōḍi bhoṁkene siṅghadhvani māḍihaṁ bhāsuraṁ bharaṁgeyēṁ śrīkakkabhūpaṁge bayale ba
pparoḷare visvaṁbharācakradoḷu . ka . baṟide paṟapaṟasi neṟe bebbaṟa beṟatuṟe Aḍakaṇa bāyi vōṟemāḍi kiṟi
de mānṁdapane subhaṭacūḍāratna kakkabhūpāḷakanu . vritta . siḍilaṁ jēṟeṟe poyvaṁ pasida puliya nērvvaṭṭuvaṁ si ṁha
maṁ mārjaḍiyutaṁ śaṭanīkamaṁ suti kīḷva viṣadharahaḍeyaṁ bālaṁbara sīḷva Endaḍe lelele maleva rā kakka
bhūpaṁgaṁ javaṁga . kāvyaṁ karalada gītavādyadoḷu paricaya līladanta besadippudu
vāta dagdharappa subhāvakanappa namma kakkarasana nakaṟim vibhuddha setakavijaga
grāmada śrīkakkabhūpa
brahmāṇḍakhaṇḍa kaḍegu vakhiḷagōtrādrigaḷa . bartuguṁ pōkaḍale
nittalu . ka . nīnuṁ bhāraviyuṁ dinēśasutanuṁ sāhityadoḷu nīnu khēcara
gāṇḍīviyuṁ nadītanayanuṁ dōrvvīryyadoḷu dhairyya doḷu dānāṁbunidhi
kaṁgāṇabi dhurado ḷidirci pratōḷiyaṁ tōṟida śatru brātameṁ mata
prakṛti taṇivina dhātriyoḷu vimaḷaśitakīrttini
maṇḍaḷikamastakapiṇḍakaṇḍana pramuka rakha ṁḍana vairimaṇḍaḷika matigri
vainatēya vācāḷamaṇḍaḷikakadaḷītānavikhaṇana pracaṇḍa suṁḍāḷa vairi
vairimaṇḍaḷikagōdhūmagharaṭṭa Aḍigaḍige biḍade cunnanuḍi
vairimaṇḍaḷikamadanamahēsaraṁ saṁgrāmavijayāditya
srutadhavaḷakīrttivūttungalatāṁgīvallabhanuṁ siṣṭēṣṭa kaḷpa
maṇṇaḷikarēvabhūpāḷana viṣāḷabhāḷasthaḷavirājita
raṇavinōda śrīdrōṇikādēvīlabdhavaraprasāda śrī manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara kakka
damaged
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda
mūrttimakaradhvajaṁ kāmakīrttidhvaja
parānganāputra kāminīkappakandarppa
sāhasōttuṁga
kakkarasaruṁ suṟuka hanneraḍumaṁ Avagavāḍi hannera
ti puṇyamūrtti
rājapūjita kīrttiyaṁ mūrttiye ndādhāriṇi poga ḷuta
manīyamūrtti mahānītiyaṁ bhaktiyaṁ niṭiḷataṭa
vikramakālada 51 neya parābhavasaṁvatsarada māgha suda 5 budhavārada
rasaru śrīkalidēvasvāmige dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa Ere bhūmi kengāḍu mattaru
ke karikayi mattaru 1 kka mūḍalu Arasara bāviyē mēre . taṁkalu belavattē mēre Antā
khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhāramāṭakūṭaprāsādhake Ikuta bapparu pōdhanake Ikuta bapparu kalyāṇasa
ryyadēvara māḍisi pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi rūvāri bamōjage kayidhāre Eṟadu biṭṭa bhūmi keṁgāḍu mattaru
mēre baḍagalu parigrahake kaige kakkarasara vidyāmāna bamōjana putra rūvārivoḍaya vōja
hērige biṭa bhūmi keṁgāḍu mattara brahmapuri nārāṇabhaṭṭarige biṭṭa bhūmi ma
turake hōdabaṭṭemēre . mūḍalu haḷa . tankalu parigraha keyi . kaḍavarada keṟege hālavaḷḷiya teṟe
naramaneya mahapradhāna hiriya perggaḍe kāḷimayyana pura sarasatidēvi pādārādhaka
pradhānahōgāndhara heggaḍe rūvari voḍeya vōjara putra bammōja vidyādhara
ge vāraṇasi gurukṣētra prayāge yarghyatīrttha sūryyagra haṇa saṁkramaṇa ditīpāta puṇyadinadendu vondu kōṭi kavileya kō
ḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnalu kaṭṭisi dānageyda phalamaku . vondu kōṭi tapōdhanarige vondu kōṭi bāhmaṇarige dānageyda phalamakku
vāraṇāsi gurukṣētra gaṁgeya taḍiyalu Ondu kōṭi kavile Ondu kōṭi tapōdhanara Ondukōṭi
Digital edition of SII 11.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
